use_codes.desc: LONG-TERM TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH GAUCHER DISEASE TYPE 1 WHO ARE CYP2D6 EXTENSIVE METABOLIZERS WITH MILD HEPATIC IMPAIRMENT AND ARE CONCURRENTLY TAKING A STRONG OR MODERATE CYP3A INHIBITOR
LONG-TERM TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH GAUCHER DISEASE TYPE 1 WHO ARE CYP2D6 EXTENSIVE METABOLIZERS WITH MODERATE TO SEVERE RENAL IMPAIRMENT
LONG-TERM TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH GAUCHER DISEASE TYPE 1 WHO ARE CYP2D6 POOR METABOLIZERS WITH 84 MG ONCE DAILY OF ELIGLUSTAT (EQUIVALENT TO 100 MG OF ELIGLUSTAT TARTRATE)

LONG-TERM TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH GAUCHER DISEASE TYPE 1 WHO ARE CYP2D6 EXTENSIVE OR INTERMEDIATE METABOLIZERS WITH 84 MG TWICE PER DAY OF ELIGLUSTAT (EQUIVALENT TO 100 MG OF ELIGLUSTAT TARTRATE TWICE PER DAY)

indications.text:
CERDELGA is indicated for the long-term treatment of adult patients with Gaucher disease type
1 (GD1) who are CYP2D6 extensive metabolizers (EMs), intermediate metabolizers (IMs), or
poor metabolizers (PMs) as detected by an FDA-cleared test [see Dosage and Administration
(2.1)].
Limitations of Use:...
